invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$1900（低于当前价3.4%，基于ATR 24.33），或融资费率转正（空头压力缓解），或Qlib分大幅下降。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $1900 (3.4% below current, based on ATR 24.33), or funding rate turns positive (short pressure eases), or Qlib score drops significantly.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$65000（低于当前价3.0%，基于ATR 703.13），或融资费率转正且价格停滞，或恐慌指数回升至中性。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $65000 (3.0% below current, based on ATR 703.13), or funding rate turns positive with price stalling, or Fear & Greed Index recovers to neutral.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$610（基于ATR 6.21约5%），或融资费率Z-score超过100%（多头拥挤），或Qlib分跌出前三。
invalidation.en: Invalidation: Price breaks below $610 (based on ATR 6.21 ~5%), or funding rate Z-score exceeds 100% (longs crowded), or Qlib score falls out of top 3.
